blockingIssues.description: Full-suite tests are currently unstable/failing in this workspace run (`agent-instructions-routes`, `agent-skills-routes`, `issue-document-restore-routes`, `private-hostname-guard`) despite targeted reruns passing in isolation.
Lease grant exclusivity is still not atomic in the empty-row race case; concurrent grantLease transactions can both pass pre-insert checks and create multiple active leases for one issue.
Production scheduler path still bypasses dispatcherService.dispatchRun() and inserts execution_envelopes directly, so dispatcher controls are not the authoritative dispatch path.
Heartbeat executeRun still derives execution context/workspace inline from contextSnapshot/resolveWorkspaceForRun rather than relying solely on envelope-authoritative dispatch context.
Intent lifecycle remains incomplete: intents are left admitted by scheduler, but no runtime execution path transitions admitted intents to consumed.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify test-first expectations for fix/refactor features (strict red-phase vs. practical exception path), and require explicit handoff justification when implementation begins before targeted failing tests.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both fix reviews observed edits preceding targeted red-phase test execution while handoff reported followedProcedure=true.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update the documented intent-to-execution flow to match current production wiring (or explicitly call out that scheduler still constructs envelopes directly pending dispatcher-path completion).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both fix reviews found architecture docs stating Scheduler -> Dispatcher production flow while scheduler currently inserts execution_envelopes directly and dispatcher dispatchRun() is not on active production path.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add an operational note about current routine coalescing behavior under intent-driven dispatch, including that concurrent second dispatch may fail before scheduler creates a run.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: fix-intent-dispatch-pipeline review cited widened routine coalescing test expectations and handoff discovered issue indicating this caveat is currently real but undocumented in shared library notes.

rejectedObservations.observation: Architecture flow mismatch was reported by both fix reviewers.
backend-worker red-phase/procedure mismatch was reported by both fix reviewers.
